type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Emissions increased in 2015  due to  non-routine accidental releases to air. Corrective measures were taken immediately to stop and control  these  accidental releases.
Also, please note that the non-routine accidental releases are now reported under spills. In 2014 these releases were reported under storage & handling category .

substance.en: Naphthenic acid fraction compounds (and their salts)
substance.fr: Composés de la fraction d’acides naphténiques (et leurs sels)

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: The sampling methodology used is the widely accepted FTIR test; however, these tests are susceptible to interference from humic and fulvic acids and other organic acids that are not Naphthenic Acids. There is a potential for overestimating the emissions. A more detailed analysis will be done in the coming years when there is an opportunity to do so.
